attributes.name: 12146-PA44
attributes.description:
Size DN 200 (8")

Flange ISO-F

Material Aluminum

Actuator Pneumatic: double acting

Position Indication Signal Yes

Solenoid Yes

Pressure Min. 1 × 10-7 mbar

Pressure Max. 1.6 bar (abs)

Conductance 12000 ls⁻¹

Differential Pressure on Plate ≤ 1.6 ba

Differential Pressure at opening ≤ 0.03 bar

Cylinder volume 0.9 l

Max. compressed air pressure 7 bar / 102 psi

Min. compressed air pressure 4 bar / 58 psi

Max. temperature position indicator ≤ 80 °C

Close open time 3 s

Weight 14 kg / 30.86 lbs

Max. Temperature Actuator ≤ 80 °C

Max. temperature valve body ≤ 120 °C
